legal_form: Network of separate legal entities; not a global partnership or multinational corporation
notes: PwC is the brand used by separate member firms. PwCIL coordinates the network but does not own member firms or provide client services. PwC reports a 1 July-30 June fiscal year. Global revenue is termed aggregated gross revenue, expressed in US dollars at average fiscal-year exchange rates and inclusive of expenses billed to clients; recent reports also state that interterritory revenue is excluded.

legal_form: Private company limited by guarantee without share capital
notes: Registered office: 1 Embankment Place, London, WC2N 6RH. Non-trading coordinating entity; it does not practise accountancy or provide client services. The coordinating role is additionally supported by src_pwc_structure.
